key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh usage data in seconds

key.name: display-mode
key.description: How to display usage in the panel: 'text' for percentage text, 'bar' for a progress bar, or 'both' for both

key.name: icon-style
key.description: Icon style: 'color' for the original colored icon, 'monochrome' for a desaturated monochrome icon

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to show the Claude icon in the top bar

key.name: proxy-url
key.description: HTTP proxy URL (e.g., http://localhost:11809). Leave empty to use no proxy.
